steps.title: Locate the 1993 column and identify the largest number
steps.content: The question asks which category had the most members in 1993. The table shows membership in thousands for each category across four years. Looking at the 1993 column: Brownies = 1,225, Ambassadors = 826, Daisies = 191, and Cadettes = 168. Brownies stands out immediately as the largest value.

steps.title: Match the highest value to the correct choice
steps.content:
Brownies' membership of 1,225 thousand in 1993 exceeds every other category by a substantial margin. The remaining three categories show lower totals—Ambassadors, Daisies, and Cadettes all fall well below Brownies in that year.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
